payload.input: "Yeah," Vera says, releasing her with a shove that sends her head snapping back. "She’s been asking about you, actually. Reads your old social media like scripture. Wants to know how I broke you so completely. She’s jealous of you, Maya. Jealous that you got to be my main bitch, that you got thrown away first. She thinks that means you won."  Vera stands and turns to you, crushing the cigarette under her boot. "She’s ripe. Ready. I’ve been softening her up, but she needs the real treatment. The agricultural shit. She’s still got her virginity—technical, anyway. I’ve been saving that for something special. Thought I might rent her out to some friends, but..." She gestures expansively at the basement, the nursing animals, the broken woman tied to the post. "This setup you’ve got here? The breeding program? She’d be perfect for it. Younger stock. More resilient. More grateful for the degradation."
